Table.name: Collateral_Non-financial_asset_assignment
Table.commentInRDBMS: Collateral Non-financial asset assigment is the combination of Collateral and Non-financial asset indicating which Collateral is aggregated into which non-financial asset.

Column.name: Collateral_non-financial_asset_assignment_type
Column.comment: Collateral non-financial asset assignment type discriminates between the different types of combinations between Collateral and Non-financial asset

Column.name: Physical_collateral_identifier1
Column.comment: An identifier to uniquely identify each collateral.

Column.name: Time_elapsed_since_initial_recognition4
Column.comment: Time elapsed since initial recognition band classifies time elapsed since initial recognition in the balance sheet into bands used for FINREP reporting.

Column.name: Property,_plant_and_equipment_taken_into_possession_reference_date2
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: Property,_plant_and_equipment_taken_into_possession_reporting_agent_identifier2
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: Held_for_sale_indicator2
Column.comment: Held for sale indicates the Non-current assets and instruments in disposal groups classified as held for sale in accordance with IFRS5. Is not applicable under national GAAP based on BAD.

Column.name: Measurement_method2
Column.comment: Measurement method identifies the type of measurement method according to IAS (See IAS 16.30, 16.31 and IAS 40.33-55, 76). It distinguishes into their cost or revaluation model.

Column.name: Subject_to_operating_lease_indicator2
Column.comment: An indicator to specify if an object is subject to operating lease or not.

Column.name: Property,_plant_and_equipment_taken_into_possession_type2
Column.comment: A discriminator to distinguish between property, plant and equipment taken into possession during and before the reporting period.

Column.name: Physical_collateral_accounting_consolidation_level1
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Property,_plant_and_equipment_taken_into_possession_accounting_consolidation_level2
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Immaterial_rights_as_collateral_reference_date2
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: Immaterial_rights_as_collateral_reporting_agent_identifier2
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: Immaterial_rights_as_collateral_accounting_consolidation_level2
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Immaterial_rights_as_collateral_identifier2
Column.comment: An identifier to uniquely identify each collateral.

Column.name: Other_intangible_asset_taken_into_possession_accounting_consolidation_level
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Other_intangible_asset_taken_into_possession_type
Column.comment: Other intangible asset taken into possession type distinguishes other intangible asset between those taken into possession during the reporting period and those taken into possession before the reporting period.

Column.name: Subject_to_operating_lease_indicator6
Column.comment: An indicator to specify if an object is subject to operating lease or not.

Column.name: Held_for_sale_indicator6
Column.comment: Held for sale indicates the Non-current assets and instruments in disposal groups classified as held for sale in accordance with IFRS5. Is not applicable under national GAAP based on BAD.

Column.name: Measurement_method6
Column.comment: Measurement method identifies the type of measurement method according to IAS (See IAS 16.30, 16.31 and IAS 40.33-55, 76). It distinguishes into their cost or revaluation model.

Column.name: Software_assets_indicator2
Column.comment: Software asset indicator indicates whether the reported asset is a software asset or not.

Column.name: Time_elapsed_since_initial_recognition3
Column.comment: Time elapsed since initial recognition band classifies time elapsed since initial recognition in the balance sheet into bands used for FINREP reporting.

Column.name: Software_collateral_reference_date2
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: Software_collateral_reporting_agent_identifier2
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: Software_collateral_accounting_consolidation_level2
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Software_collateral_identifier2
Column.comment: An identifier to uniquely identify each collateral.

Column.name: Property,_plant_and_equipment_taken_into_possession_reference_date
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: Property,_plant_and_equipment_taken_into_possession_reporting_agent_identifier
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: Property,_plant_and_equipment_taken_into_possession_accounting_consolidation_level
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Held_for_sale_indicator3
Column.comment: Held for sale indicates the Non-current assets and instruments in disposal groups classified as held for sale in accordance with IFRS5. Is not applicable under national GAAP based on BAD.

Column.name: Measurement_method3
Column.comment: Measurement method identifies the type of measurement method according to IAS (See IAS 16.30, 16.31 and IAS 40.33-55, 76). It distinguishes into their cost or revaluation model.

Column.name: Subject_to_operating_lease_indicator3
Column.comment: An indicator to specify if an object is subject to operating lease or not.

Column.name: Time_elapsed_since_initial_recognition2
Column.comment: Time elapsed since initial recognition band classifies time elapsed since initial recognition in the balance sheet into bands used for FINREP reporting.

Column.name: Property,_plant_and_equipment_taken_into_possession_type
Column.comment: A discriminator to distinguish between property, plant and equipment taken into possession during and before the reporting period.

Column.name: Software_collateral_reference_date
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: Software_collateral_reporting_agent_identifier
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: Software_collateral_accounting_consolidation_level
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Software_collateral_identifier
Column.comment: An identifier to uniquely identify each collateral.

Column.name: Property,_plant_and_equipment_not_taken_into_possession_accounting_consolidation_level
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Held_for_sale_indicator5
Column.comment: Held for sale indicates the Non-current assets and instruments in disposal groups classified as held for sale in accordance with IFRS5. Is not applicable under national GAAP based on BAD.

Column.name: Measurement_method5
Column.comment: Measurement method identifies the type of measurement method according to IAS (See IAS 16.30, 16.31 and IAS 40.33-55, 76). It distinguishes into their cost or revaluation model.

Column.name: Subject_to_operating_lease_indicator5
Column.comment: An indicator to specify if an object is subject to operating lease or not.

Column.name: Physical_collateral_identifier3
Column.comment: An identifier to uniquely identify each collateral.

Column.name: Physical_collateral_accounting_consolidation_level3
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Non-software_property,_plant_and_equipment_not_taken_into_possession_reference_date
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: Non-software_property,_plant_and_equipment_not_taken_into_possession_reporting_agent_identifier
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: Non-software_property,_plant_and_equipment_not_taken_into_possession_accounting_consolidation_level
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Held_for_sale_indicator1
Column.comment: Held for sale indicates the Non-current assets and instruments in disposal groups classified as held for sale in accordance with IFRS5. Is not applicable under national GAAP based on BAD.

Column.name: Measurement_method1
Column.comment: Measurement method identifies the type of measurement method according to IAS (See IAS 16.30, 16.31 and IAS 40.33-55, 76). It distinguishes into their cost or revaluation model.

Column.name: Subject_to_operating_lease_indicator1
Column.comment: An indicator to specify if an object is subject to operating lease or not.

Column.name: Physical_collateral_accounting_consolidation_level
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Physical_collateral_identifier
Column.comment: An identifier to uniquely identify each collateral.

Column.name: Investment_property_reference_date
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: Investment_property_reporting_agent_identifier
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: Investment_property_accounting_consolidation_level
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Held_for_sale_indicator7
Column.comment: Held for sale indicates the Non-current assets and instruments in disposal groups classified as held for sale in accordance with IFRS5. Is not applicable under national GAAP based on BAD.

Column.name: Measurement_method7
Column.comment: Measurement method identifies the type of measurement method according to IAS (See IAS 16.30, 16.31 and IAS 40.33-55, 76). It distinguishes into their cost or revaluation model.

Column.name: Subject_to_operating_lease_indicator7
Column.comment: An indicator to specify if an object is subject to operating lease or not.

Column.name: Immaterial_rights_as_collateral_reference_date
Column.comment: The date the data refers to.

Column.name: Immaterial_rights_as_collateral_reporting_agent_identifier
Column.comment: Identifier of the reporting agent.

Column.name: Immaterial_rights_as_collateral_identifier
Column.comment: An identifier to uniquely identify each collateral.

Column.name: Immaterial_rights_as_collateral_accounting_consolidation_level
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Other_intangible_asset_not_taken_into_possession_accounting_consolidation_level
Column.comment: Accounting consolidation level is the level on which the accounting is consolidated, Solo or group.

Column.name: Subject_to_operating_lease_indicator
Column.comment: An indicator to specify if an object is subject to operating lease or not.

Column.name: Held_for_sale_indicator
Column.comment: Held for sale indicates the Non-current assets and instruments in disposal groups classified as held for sale in accordance with IFRS5. Is not applicable under national GAAP based on BAD.

Column.name: Measurement_method
Column.comment: Measurement method identifies the type of measurement method according to IAS (See IAS 16.30, 16.31 and IAS 40.33-55, 76). It distinguishes into their cost or revaluation model.

Column.name: Software_assets_indicator
Column.comment: Software asset indicator indicates whether the reported asset is a software asset or not.

Column.name: Time_elapsed_since_initial_recognition
Column.comment: Time elapsed since initial recognition band classifies time elapsed since initial recognition in the balance sheet into bands used for FINREP reporting.
